name: Smono Start
summary: The Smono Start is a reliable, entry-level dry-herb vaporiser designed specifically for beginners and value-focused customers.
description: The Smono Start is a reliable, entry-level dry-herb vaporiser designed specifically for beginners and value-focused customers. This compact dry-herb vaporiser features 5 preset temperature settings, allowing users to tailor vapour density and flavour to their preference. With a temperature range of approximately 190 °C to 230 °C, the Smono Start covers both flavour-driven sessions and denser vapour production. Using a conduction heating system, the Smono Start heats quickly and efficiently, making it ideal for short, on-the-go sessions. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
